cards.title: X Home Timeline Digest
cards.description: Open the X home timeline in a fresh tab, scroll a bounded set of posts, and return a digest of visible cards.

cards.title: Open X URL
cards.description: Open any X URL (post, longform article, or same-author thread) and return a unified markdown rendering plus media + linked-page URLs. Auto-detects kind.

cards.title: Like X Post
cards.description: Open a post URL, pause for review, and click the one-way Like control.

cards.title: Reply To X Post
cards.description: Open a post URL, draft a reply in the inline composer, pause for review, and send on continuation.

cards.title: Create X Post
cards.description: Open the X compose route, draft a post, pause for review, and send on continuation.

cards.title: Open X Inbox
cards.description: Open the X Chat inbox read-only and snapshot its state.

cards.title: Open X DM Thread
cards.description: Open one DM thread URL read-only and snapshot the composer state.

cards.title: Send X DM
cards.description: Open a profile DM composer, draft a message, pause for review, and send on continuation.

cards.title: Reply In X DM Thread
cards.description: Open a DM thread, draft a reply, pause for review, and send on continuation.

cards.title: Search X Posts
cards.description: Search X for posts from a handle, optionally within a date window, across top/latest/live tabs.

cards.title: X Profile Posts
cards.description: Open one handle's profile timeline and return up to 20 recent posts.
